CustomField.description: If the event is a congress or conference, will a symposium be conducted? If so, which departments will participate ? Please note that the Sales department <u>should not</u> participate in any symposium and should remain stationed at the desigated area for promotional activities (e.g., at the booth)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If the event is a congress/conference, will a symposium be conducted? If so, which departments will participate?
CustomField.label: Conference/Congress Departments
